steps.t: Elskur can be found in eastern Azanulbizar. Talk to Elskur.
Hersegg can be found in Akrâz-zahar. You should ask Hersegg about the necklace Elskur buried for his wife.
The necklace can be found in the mountains east of the Mirrormere in Dimrill Dale. You should look for the buried necklace.
Hersegg can be found in Akrâz-zahar. You should bring the necklace to Hersegg.
Elgun can be found in Erebor. You should bring the necklace to Elgun.
